description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden storage box with a classic crate design, featuring a rectangular shape and reinforced corners with visible metal fasteners. The exterior is constructed from wooden planks, with a diagonal support beam on each face for added structural integrity. The top surface consists of several parallel wooden slats, giving it a sturdy and rustic appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the box is finished in a warm brown color. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box appears to be fully enclosed. Its robust build suggests it is suitable for storing or transporting goods in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or outdoor spaces.
description: A sturdy, brown wooden storage crate with reinforced corners and a classic slatted design, featuring visible wood grain and metal fasteners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden planks, diagonal support beam, and metal fasteners at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the same plank and diagonal support pattern visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually indistinguishable from the front and side, maintaining the same crate design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again mirroring the other faces with the same wooden plank and diagonal support layout.
